title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: School Talent Show
questions.text: Anyone interested in performing should write their name on the list outside the drama room. If your act needs music, send the file to Mr Jones before Wednesday so he can test the sound system.
questions.question: What should performers with music do?

options.A: Give it to the teacher before the show.
options.B: Write the song name on the drama room list.
options.C: Test the sound system themselves on Wednesday.

questions.explanation: Music files must be sent to Mr Jones before Wednesday.

questions.heading: Message from Erin to Luke
questions.text: Luke, I watched the video you recommended. The first part was confusing, but the examples later were really useful. I’m going to watch that section again before tomorrow’s lesson.
questions.question: What does Erin think about the video?

options.A: Part of it helped her understand better.
options.B: It was too confusing to be useful.
options.C: It should be watched after the lesson.

questions.explanation: Erin says the later examples were useful.

questions.heading: Science Lab
questions.text: Students must wear safety glasses when heating liquids. If you forget yours, ask the teacher before the experiment begins. Do not borrow glasses from another student during practical work.
questions.question: What does the notice tell students?

options.A: Get help before starting if equipment is missing.
options.B: Share safety glasses with another student.
options.C: Heat liquids only after practical work ends.

questions.explanation: Students without glasses should ask the teacher before the experiment begins.

questions.heading: From: Sophie / Subject: Dance practice
questions.text: I know the competition routine is nearly ready, but the ending still looks untidy. Could we spend most of tomorrow’s practice on the last thirty seconds instead of starting something new?
questions.question: What does Sophie suggest?

options.A: Practising one part more carefully tomorrow.
options.B: Changing the whole competition routine completely.
options.C: Beginning a new dance tomorrow instead.

questions.explanation: She wants to focus on the last thirty seconds.

questions.heading: Farm Shop
questions.text: Fresh strawberries are available today, but only in small boxes because the weather has slowed the crop. Larger boxes should be ready next week. Customers may order them in advance.
questions.question: What does the advert explain?

options.A: A bigger amount can be reserved for later.
options.B: Strawberries are not being sold today.
options.C: Large boxes are cheaper this week.

questions.explanation: Larger boxes are expected next week and can be ordered in advance.
